title: Life in a Bubble
description: A mod about bubbles that control time created for Modfest 1.21
body:
A mod that centers around bubbles that change the tick rate of entities and block entities. 
![Blue bubble in a plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89888766d89d7dffb874ecb23f913251dd1c3ceb.jpeg)

These bubbles can be customized through a block known as the bubble workshop.
![The menu of a bubble workshop with options to change speed and range.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a7ee433a25935dce1bc61a397d4c6e2dfc34c5.jpeg)
Through this block you can change the shader that displays the bubble as well as the shader players seen when inside the bubble.

Shaders can also be added through resource packs.
